title: Cute Clocks
description: Makes the clock prettier and more legible
body:
The vanilla Clock's sprite becomes jumbled as it rotates, which makes it difficult to read. This pack replaces it with a simple 12-hour watch. Its face glows warm or cool to signify whether the sun or moon is up, so you'll know if it's safe to surface just like in vanilla! 

I'm sure this concept has been made many times - this is just my take. Setting up the animation and model files was a bit of a pain, so I thought I'd make it available in case it happens to fit someone's pack and save them some time <3
